title: Rock-a-bye
lyrics:
[verse]
Rock-a-bye, rock-a-bye
Rock-a-bye over the sea
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye
Come back to me
Sailing on moonlight rocking on air
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye I'll meet you there

[chorus]
Sway and sway and sway and sleep
Sway and sway and sway and sleep

[verse]
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye into the night
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye hold on tight
Carried by starlight drifting so slow
Rock-a-bye rock-a-bye let yourself go

[chorus]
Sway and sway and sway and sleep
Sway and sway and sway and sleep
Rock-a-bye goodnight

title: You Are Safe
cover_prompt: Watercolor, warm glowing house at night, strong walls, warm light in window, stars above, solid safe golden warmth
lyrics:
[verse]
I am here
The walls are strong the door is shut
The blanket wrapped around
And nothing from the dark outside
Can make a single sound

[chorus]
I am here, I am here
Nothing going to come
I am here, I am here
You are safe at home

[verse]
The shadows are just shapes that play
They cannot touch they cannot stay
And every sound you hear tonight
Is just the house that holds you tight

[chorus]
I am here, I am here
Nothing going to come
I am here, I am here
I am still here
style_prompt: Protective lullaby, warm female vocal, low register, simple piano chords, 62 BPM, steady, certain, grounded, reassuring, no vibrato, direct delivery, like a spoken promise set to a simple melody, minimal melodic movement, unwavering, soft piano accompaniment

title: How Dreams Began
cover_prompt: Watercolor, single star falling through vast night sky, cracking open revealing golden light, deep blue, ancient, mythological
lyrics:
[verse]
Long before you were born
Before there were dreams the night was just dark
And no one knew why they would sleep
Until a small star fell out of the sky
And cracked open soft warm and deep

[chorus]
And that was the first dream
The very first one
It taught all the others
How dreaming is done

[verse]
It floated through windows of every house
And showed the sleeping world things
Mountains that talked and oceans that sang
And fish that had feathery wings

[chorus]
And that was the first dream
The very first one
And it's still true tonight

character.name: Nalu
character.identity: A gentle seal pup who hums the ocean’s safety into the night.
character.special: Carries the rhythm of the waves in their voice, always steady and warm.

about: A soothing, repetitive lullaby that mimics the unwavering rhythm of ocean waves. The steady, humming pattern creates a shield of sound, wrapping little ones in warmth and security. Perfect for anxious minds needing the comfort of consistency.

title: Mira’s Pillow Fight
cover_prompt: A small girl with wild curls, half-asleep, hugging a plump pillow in a cozy moonlit bedroom. The pillow glows softly, and her angry frown melts into a tired smile as fireflies drift near the window.
lyrics:
[verse]
What a day, what a day
Toss and turn, shout and play
Pillow’s warm but I won’t stay
Kick the sheets and run away

[chorus]
Oh, the day is done
Oh, the day is done
Lay your head, my little one
And the day is done

[verse]
Tripped my toe, spilled my cup
Sister took the toy truck up
Daddy said to clean my plate
I just threw it at the gate

[chorus]
Oh, the day is done
Oh, the day is done
Lay your head, my little one
And the day is done

[verse]
Now the moon is soft and low
Pillow holds me, warm and slow
Angry thoughts begin to fade
In the dark my bed’s remade

[chorus]
Oh, the day is done
Oh, the day is done
Lay your head, my little one
And the day is done
style_prompt: Intimate domestic lullaby, warm female vocal, soft acoustic guitar, 64 BPM, cozy, familiar, conversational, almost speaking melodically, not performative, kitchen-to-bedroom energy, end of day warmth, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Mira
character.identity: A fiery little girl who struggles to let go of her big feelings at bedtime.
character.special: She turns her pillow into a friend who whispers the day is over.

about: A lullaby for children who fight sleep with frustration, acknowledging their anger while gently guiding them toward closure. The repetition of "the day is done" acts as a soothing mantra, helping little ones release the day’s chaos and settle into rest.

character.name: Lulu
character.identity: A tiny night-dwelling creature who hums the world to sleep with her soft, curious sounds.
character.special: Her voice mirrors the quiet rhythms of the forest, turning every rustle and sigh into a lullaby.

about: A gentle, descending lullaby where the world settles into stillness one soft sound at a time. The mirrored rhythms of nature—breath, breeze, and moonlight—guide little ones into sleep, offering permission to let go with each quiet note.

title: Mara’s Moonlit Pond
cover_prompt: A small, round frog named Mara sits on a wide lily pad at dusk, her eyes half-closed as fireflies flicker above the still pond. Three sleepy fish circle below the surface, and four ducks nestle close on the grassy bank, all bathed in soft moonlight.
lyrics:
[verse]
One frog on a lily so green
Floats soft in the silver sheen
Dreams drift on the water’s glow
Soft and slow, soft and slow

[verse]
One frog on a lily so green
Floats soft in the silver sheen
Two fish in the ripple below
Weave circles, soft and slow

[verse]
One frog on a lily so green
Floats soft in the silver sheen
Two fish in the ripple below
Weave circles, soft and slow
Three bugs on a reed so tall
Hum quiet, then drift, then fall

[verse]
One frog on a lily so green
Floats soft in the silver sheen
Two fish in the ripple below
Weave circles, soft and slow
Three bugs on a reed so tall
Hum quiet, then drift, then fall
Four ducks on the bank so still
Close their eyes, bend their bill
And that was all
style_prompt: Children's counting lullaby, clear sweet female vocal, xylophone and music box, 66 BPM, simple repetitive melody, same tune every line, cumulative nursery rhyme structure, bright but soft, childlike, extremely predictable rhythm, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Mara
character.identity: A gentle frog who watches over the pond as her friends fall asleep
character.special: She hums the quietest tune to help every creature drift into dreams

about: A soothing cumulative lullaby where pond friends settle one by one. The repetitive, gentle counting slows busy minds, while the soft imagery of still water and drifting dreams eases children into sleep.

character.name: Shloo
character.identity: A tiny, weightless creature who drifts through the night sky, rocking the stars to sleep.
character.special: Carries the rhythm of the universe in their breath, soothing even the brightest, most restless stars.

about: A swaying, vestibular lullaby that mimics the gentle rocking of a cradle or a boat on calm waters. The soft, alternating high-low syllables create a soothing rhythm, helping little ones release tension and drift into sleep as they imagine floating among the stars with Shloo.

title: Mara’s Fading Light
cover_prompt: A mother with long, loose hair sits on a porch step at dusk, watching her child run ahead down a golden-lit path, one small hand waving back. The sky glows soft pink, and fireflies begin to flicker in the tall grass.
lyrics:
[verse]
I watched you today
Tiny hands in the sun
You giggled so bright
Like the whole world was fun
Your feet barely touched
The soft summer ground
Every moment so sweet
Every laugh the best sound

[chorus]
Oh my love, you won’t remember this
The way the light danced in your hair
You won’t know how my heart just held you close
But I’ll be there, I’ll be there

[verse]
I watched you today
You ran past the gate
Your voice called my name
But you didn’t wait
The years slip so fast
Like a breeze through the trees
You’re growing so tall
And I’m learning to breathe

[chorus]
Oh my love, you won’t remember this
The way the light danced in your hair
You won’t know how my heart just held you close
But I’ll be there, I’ll be there
style_prompt: Intimate singer-songwriter lullaby, breathy unpolished female vocal, low register, sparse solo piano with single notes, 60 BPM, vulnerable, tender, raw, emotional, like singing alone late at night, not a performance, imperfect and real, extreme sparsity, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Mara
character.identity: A mother singing to her growing child as the years slip by like summer light.
character.special: Holds every fleeting moment like a quiet promise in her heart.

about: A tender, bittersweet lullaby about watching a child grow up too fast. The gentle repetition of "you won’t remember this" helps children feel safe in the present, while acknowledging the natural passage of time. The song’s quiet vulnerability fosters deep bonding, easing little hearts into sleep.

title: Veeva and the Rolling Wave

character.name: Veeva
character.identity: A tiny, curious seal pup who rides the waves to lull the ocean to sleep.
character.special: Her gentle rocking never disturbs the water, only soothes it.

about: A swaying, ocean-inspired lullaby that mimics the gentle back-and-forth of waves. The lilting rhythm engages the vestibular system, helping little ones feel the soothing motion of rocking. Perfect for winding down active minds with the calming embrace of the sea.

title: Mira and the Silver Dreams
cover_prompt: A small, round-faced girl with long dark hair curled under a quilt, peeking at tiny glowing dream creatures with silver wings fluttering outside her window. Soft moonlight spills across the floor, and the room glows in warm watercolor hues.
lyrics:
The dreams are out tonight
Softly calling through the air
Looking for a sleepy sight
Eyes that close without a care

One just tapped upon your pane
Whispered, "Child, are you still there?"
Almost stayed but slipped like rain
Back into the dreaming glare

[chorus]
Close your eyes and they will come
Dancing light and whispered hum
Close your eyes and they will stay
Till the break of waking day

Tiny dream with silver wings
Tried to land upon your nose
Told you all the secret things
That the moon and nighttime knows

But you stirred and turned away
So it flew on silver toes
Now it waits for you to say
"Come and visit, soft repose"

[chorus]
Close your eyes and they will come
Dancing light and whispered hum
Close your eyes and they will stay
Till the break of waking day

Better close your eyes
style_prompt: Playful mysterious lullaby, warm female vocal, soft woodwind and low flute, 64 BPM, mischievous, conspiratorial, whimsical, fairy tale energy, like sharing a secret, mysterious but gentle, storytelling melody, soft breathy flute accompaniment

character.name: Mira
character.identity: A curious little girl who almost catches dreams before they slip away
character.special: She can hear the whispers of dreams if she listens very closely

about: A playful lullaby about dreams searching for sleepy children to visit. The gentle fear of missing out (FOMO) encourages little ones to close their eyes so the magic can begin. The conspiratorial tone makes bedtime feel like a secret adventure.

title: Lumi and the First Dream
cover_prompt: A small glowing child with silver hair, Lumi, dancing barefoot on a field of soft blue night. Silver threads of light swirl around her like fireflies, weaving into the shape of a dream. The moon watches gently from above, casting a warm glow over the quiet, star-filled sky.
lyrics:
[verse]
Long before you were born
Sky was wide and the earth was new
No one knew what a dream could be
No soft glow in the midnight blue

[verse]
Then came Lumi with silver light
Dancing slow on the edge of sight
She hummed low where the dark was deep
And the world gave a quiet leap

[chorus]
That was the first dream
Soft as a sigh
Woven from wonder
Way up so high
That was the first dream
Floating so free
Born in the starlight
Just for you and me

[verse]
Lumi tiptoed past the moon
Whispered secrets to the air
Every shadow, every tune
Learned to drift without a care

[chorus]
That was the first dream
Soft as a sigh
Woven from wonder
Way up so high
That was the first dream
Floating so free
Born in the starlight
Just for you and me

[verse]
Now you close your sleepy eyes
See the spark that Lumi made
First dream ever in the skies
And it's still true tonight
style_prompt: Ancient storytelling lullaby, warm resonant female vocal, singing bowl and soft cello drone, 60 BPM, mythological, vast, reverent, timeless, the voice of someone very old and very kind, starts spacious and narrows to intimate, wonder without weight, low drone pad accompaniment

character.name: Lumi
character.identity: A gentle dream-weaver who brought the very first dream to the world.
character.special: She turns wonder into dreams with just a whisper and a dance.

about: A curious lullaby about the birth of the first dream, where wonder fills the night sky. The story of Lumi’s gentle magic helps children drift into sleep, knowing dreams have always been there—soft, floating, and full of light.

title: Chaand So Gaya
